channel.title: Configure Header
channel.description:
<!--
Are you asking about "how to solve a specific issue/error/problem in your Frontity project"?
If so, please check this guide on the information we suggest you include in your topic so the community (and the Frontity team) can provide the best possible help as quickly and as efficiently as possible
https://community.frontity.org/t/about-the-dev-talk-questions-category/2/3
The info you may provide: - Description of your issue - Specific errors you’re getting in the terminal or in the browser’s console - A repository with the code of your project - A deployed version of your site - The URL of your WP REST API
--> Good morning, I need to configure a header for authorization to access my api. Can someone help me http://tan.mybrontley.com/wp-admin

item.title: Configure Header
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Hi @hugsaf2132

Here you have a suggested solution for adding headers to a request using fetch

Send authorization header 🤗 Dev Talk & Questions
Heres a way to get menus that worked for me. import { fetch } from "frontity"; const responseMenus = await fetch("https://example.com/wp-json/wp/v2/menus", { method: "GET", headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${responseJSON.access_token}`, }, });

Read full topic

item.title: Configure Header
item.dc:creator: hugsaf2132
item.description:
Good morning, I need to configure a header for authorization to access my api. Can someone help me
http://tan.mybrontley.com/wp-admin

Read full topic
